name: The Rapture Index
text:
At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player names a chaos this turn (a die to be rolled or a coin to be flipped). If no dice are rolled and no coins are flipped before their end step, put two doom counters on the Doomsday Clock. The Index abhors a calm turn.
Whenever the Doomsday Clock reaches a new highest count, you draw a card and the tallest player at the table reads the new threat level aloud.
flavorText: Today's reading: SEVERE. Yesterday's reading: SEVERE. The needle is painted on.
